title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Following the ongoing strong market momentum, this week's SnP activity has continued along the same trend. We have recorded several sales across dry segments, with a particular focus on about 15-20-year-old larger bulk carrier tonnage. Across the space, a significant number of vessels are currently receiving offers with deadlines extending into next week.
